“To ask what sparks joy isn’t merely a change of habit;
it changes your entire life.”

“The question of what you own
is actually the question of how you want to live.”

“When you surround yourself with possessions that spark joy,
you will create a home you love and the life you deserve.”

“Everyone can feel the energy and joy you gain from tidying.
The magic is contagious.”

– Marie Kondo

Organizing the world, one home at a time.
Discover how the KonMari Method™ can transform your life.

LEARN MORE

A Life-Changing Method for Everyone

Invented by Marie Kondo, the KonMari Method is a simple but effective organizing system that uses a transformative criterion: choosing what sparks joy. With the Method, you will learn to listen to your inner voice and make space for the life you want.

Reduced Clutter

Increased Focus

Renewed Energy

A More Fulfilled Life

WHAT WE OFFER

Discover decluttering techniques and tidying tips

Read More

Find someone to help me organize my home

Hire a Consultant

Learn the Konmari Method to tidy my home

Take Tidying Course

Become a professional expert in the art of organizing 

Become a Consultant

What Our Professional Organizers Say About the Program


PROFESSIONALS WHO ORGANIZE THE WORLD™

900+

Experts in the program.

60%

Started their own business.

Jasmine Dunker

“With her Method, Marie effectively gets to the core question: What makes you happy? It is a question of the heart and we let our heart decide, which is incredibly touching.”

Camille Hecker

“KonMari is a philosophy of life for me, a self-discovery and a self-transformation journey.”

Mandarin So

“Marie Kondo inspires me to always remember to live in my joy and be present.”

Ana Carra

“The KonMari Method changed my life – I choose joy from every perspective, not only with items in my home but with every aspect of life.”

Live a Life That Sparks Joy

Our KonMari Consultants are certified professional organizers who work one-on-one with clients to put an end to disorder and reignite joy. With over 900 Consultants across the world, find a partner for your organizing journey today.

Hire a Konmari Expert

Join the community and do work that sparks joy. Anyone passionate about organizing can become a KonMari Consultant through our immersive in-person and virtual programs. Change your career; change your life; organize the world. 

Become a Konmari Expert

It started with four simple words:
Does it spark joy?

Tidying Expert | Company Founder | NYTimes Bestselling Author | Emmy-Nominated TV Series Host | Mother

It started with four simple words:
Does it spark joy?

Tidying Expert | Company Founder | NYTimes Bestselling Author | Emmy-Nominated TV Series Host | Mother

As the world’s leading organizing expert, Marie and her KonMari Method have helped thousands of people across the globe make space for their priorities, passions and goals. She launched KonMari as a resource for people passionate about getting organized, from new hobbyists to seasoned professionals.
